title: chamaemelum coronarium
intro: Chamaemelum coronarium, also known as English chamomile or wild chamomile, is an annual or biennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and delicate foliage. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues, calm anxiety and insomnia, and reduce skin irritations. The health benefits of Chamaemelum coronarium include its ability to promote relaxation, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Chamaemelum coronarium can be found in teas, tinctures, salves, and ointments, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
